General.Name: Energy Resources of Australia Ltd
General.Description: Energy Resources of Australia Ltd engages in mine rehabilitation in Australia. It rehabilitates the Ranger project area, a uranium mine. The company was incorporated in 1980 and is headquartered in Darwin, Australia. Energy Resources of Australia Ltd is a subsidiary of North Limited.

1.Name: Mr. David  Pritchard-Davies
1.Title: Chief Financial Officer, Joint Company Secretary & Director
